item.title: Liverpool rocked by last-gasp defeat at Wolves
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)
The reigning champions suffer an embarrassing 2-1 stoppage-time defeat at the Premier League's bottom club.

item.title: India’s Sindhu withdraws from All England Open after Dubai ordeal
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)
PV Sindhu was stranded at Dubai airport on her way to the All England Open as global air travel was disrupted since Sunday after the US and Israel attacked Iran.

item.title: World Cup ticket frenzy unfolds amid challenges
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)

item.title: Jun Hao shocks Nishimoto in All England opener
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)

item.title: Flamengo sack coach Filipe Luis after 8-0 win in shock move

Source: FMT Sports (Sports)

item.title: Swiatek, Gauff inspired by figure skater Liu’s journey from teen burnout to Olympic gold
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)
Alysa Liu retired at 16 after the 2022 Beijing Games but returned to end a 20-year US women’s Olympic medal drought last month.

item.title: WTA players divided on five-set matches proposal at Grand Slams
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)
Women’s tennis is currently played as best-of-three sets, and there are proposals to extend it to best-of-five, in line with the men’s format at Grand Slam events.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), malaysia(+3)
